input.command:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace/frontend && node --input-type=module << 'EOF'
import { queryRelayChains } from './node_modules/@relayprotocol/relay-kit-hooks/_esm/index.js'
const result = await queryRelayChains()
const eth = result?.chains?.find(c => c.id === 1)
console.log('eth iconUrl:', eth?.iconUrl)
console.log('eth displayName:', eth?.displayName)
EOF
input.description: Check what useRelayChains returns for Ethereum iconUrl
